column1: # Trans To Vostok — Korean Translation Glossary
# Curated vocabulary list for translation consistency.
# Source: Translation.xlsx (Korean translation work by MuteJack).
# Maintained for: human review during translation, prompts for machine translation,
#   TRADER      - the four trader NPCs (subset of NPC for emphasis)
#   MECHANIC    - core game systems / abstract concepts
#   STAT        - character / item attributes (Health, Hydration, etc.)
#   STATE       - state / status labels (Locked, Activated, etc.)
#   UI_ACTION   - UI buttons / actions (Take, Drop, Equip, ...)
#   WEAPON      - weapon / weapon-designation proper nouns (Jaeger, KAR-21, ...)
#   GEAR_BRAND  - Finnish military / gear product lines (Kukkaro, Jääkäri, ...)
#   DIFFICULTY  - difficulty levels (kept consistent with global UI)
#   PROPER      - other proper nouns / brand names / fixed-form abbreviations

column1: #    use "잠김" and "열기" (NOT 잠겨있음 / 열려있음 — keep concise).
# 2. NPC name "Bandit" → 밴디트 (transliteration; NOT 도적 or 약탈자).
# 4. "Vostok" → 보스토크 (transliteration only). NEVER leave as Latin "Vostok",
#    NEVER use semantic translation (e.g., 동쪽). The Russian word means "east".
# 5. "Road to Vostok" (game title) → keep as Latin "Road to Vostok". Do NOT
#    translate or transliterate the game title (brand identity).
# 6. "Kilju" → 킬유 with in-game explanation in dialogue context.
# 7. Trader names: 잡화상 / 의사 / 총잡이 (or 건스미스 in some events — prefer 총잡이).
# 8. Korean particles after English placeholders ({name} 의 / {name} (으)로) —
#    use compound form "(으)로", "(이)가" for natural fit regardless of suffix.
# 9. Item suffixes (e.g., "Hoodie B." for Hoodie (Border Zone)): translate the
#    full form, the abbreviated form usually stays in original or matches.
# 10. Casette track titles: keep original Finnish/English (e.g., "Junna - Haavakko").
# 11. Difficulty: 쉬움 / 보통 / 어려움 for tasks; 낮음 / 보통 / 높음 / 울트라 for graphics.
# 12. Homonym warning — same Korean used for different concepts. Use category
#     in this glossary to disambiguate during translation:
#     - 기타  : Misc (item category) vs Guitar (instrument item)
#     - 캐릭터: Character (NPC concept) vs Character (UI panel header)
#     - 지도  : Map (UI panel) vs Map item / world map texture
# 13. Weapon designations (AKS-74U, KAR-21, etc.) keep Latin form even in Korean
#     text. Only the descriptive name part may be translated (e.g., "KAR-21
# 14. Casette / Coffeemaster: typo-style spellings in source text (Casette, not
#     Cassette; Coffeemaster, not "Coffee Master") are translated as-is per the
